title: ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
